elements.content:
Today I am inaugurating this diary to recap my very first ever international travelling experience. Before this, I had never seen an aeroplane (other than in TVs and videos). I was thrilled to be seated near window in the plane for the first time. 
We visited Thailand after 2 months of our marriage. And within 4 hours we landed in Thailand, a beautiful country. We got picked up by a lady & were dropped at the hotel. On the same day before entering hotel, we visited King Power Mahanakhon Skywalk. We went up to 78th floor within 30-35 seconds & witnessed lovely Bangkok city. Later, headed to hotel, rested a bit & then went to Sai tai mai bus terminal for booking our bus tickets to Phuket. We had no other plans after that rather than going back to hotel, so we decided to explore Icon Siam a bit which was a luxury mall. Entire mall was of luxury brands which reminded me of BTS. After exploring entire mall up & down, back & forth, we decided to go back to hotel. So that’s when day 1 ended.
For Day 2, we had activities planned like Safari World, Marine Park & Jungle safari. I personally don’t like animal shows much, but I liked those shows. There were 5-6 shows & later after lunch we went to hotel to take a break because there was dinner cruise planned for us. I am being 90’s kid had only fantasized this cruise dinner thing. But when I got to experience one, I was super happy. I clicked so many pictures (well, I do that on every occasion). We had a wonderful 2 hours on the cruise. Post that we came back to room & slept. That’s how second day ended. 
Thai people were sweet. Even though we did not know their language & they did not know our language, we managed to convey messages smoothly. But it was fun too to explain them. I felt like people there are so disciplined and so punctual about timings. I did not see horn honking, no lane cutting, no rude behaviour, may be because we were tourist & that’s why they were behaving good, but my overall observation is they were well mannered.
